heading: Acceptance of certifications by applicants
label: 3220 Acceptance of certifications by applicants
text: Under terms and conditions determined by the Secretary, the Secretary may accept the certifications of an applicant for assistance under this chapter that the applicant meets the requirements of this chapter.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 3220, , , , set forth penalties for false statements, securities overvaluation, embezzlement, misapplication of funds, false book entries, schemes to defraud, and speculation, prior to repeal by , , .Pub.
